label: replay-command-trace-and-ops-hardening
topWin: Created the missing replay-input evidence layer with a bounded command trace utility, then made launch readiness machine-readable and fixed closeout autopilot help behavior.
topGap: The replay command trace is not yet bound into issued run tokens or validate-replay server validation.
ignisNote: Audit/implement sprint shipped a pure replay trust artifact plus two Studio OS operational hardening fixes. No new dependencies, secrets, network calls, or external AI/API cost.
